user.title: UK Fuel Prices — API Credentials
user.description: Enter your Client ID and Client Secret from [developer.fuel-finder.service.gov.uk](https://www.developer.fuel-finder.service.gov.uk/).

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid Client ID or Client Secret.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the UK Fuel Prices API. Check your network and try again.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests to the UK Fuel Prices API. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

abort.already_configured: UK Fuel Prices is already configured.

error.no_stations_found: No stations found matching that name. Try a shorter or different search term.

abort.device_not_found: This device is not associated with a configured station.

search_station.title: Search for a Station
search_station.description: Search by station name, brand (e.g. Tesco, BP, Shell), postcode, or town. All stations will be searched automatically. This can take a few seconds.

search_results.title: Select a Station
search_results.description: {count} station(s) found. Results show name, brand, postcode and town where available.

edit_station.title: Edit Station
edit_station.description: Update the fuel types tracked for **{station}**. To remove this station, use the delete option in the device 3-dot menu.

thresholds.title: Price Level Thresholds
thresholds.description:
Set the price thresholds (in pence) used to calculate the `price_level` attribute on each sensor.

- **Low** (green): below the low threshold
- **Medium** (amber): between low and high
- **High** (red): above the high threshold

settings.title: Update Interval
settings.description: How often to poll the Fuel Finder API for new prices. More frequent updates consume more API quota.

add_station.title: Add Station Manually
add_station.description: Enter the station details from the [UK Fuel Prices developer portal](https://www.developer.fuel-finder.service.gov.uk/). You can find the batch number and node ID by browsing the API documentation.

add_fuel_types.title: Select Fuel Types
add_fuel_types.description: Choose which fuel types to track for **{station}**.
